## Checklist

- [ ] `cargo fmt --all` — code is formatted
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features` — no warnings
- [ ] `cargo test` — all tests pass
- [ ] Docs updated if public API changed
- [ ] `BREAKING CHANGE:` noted in commit message if applicable
